# dbgenius

Local-first AI database browser — a TUI with built-in AI assistance via local LLMs.

## Problem

Database tools are split between bloated GUIs (TablePlus, DataGrip) and bare CLIs (psql) with no intelligence. No terminal-native database browser exists with modern UX *and* local AI assistance for schema explanation, SQL generation, and query optimization.

## Quick Links
- [PRD](PRD.md)
- [Task List](BUILD_PLAN.md)

## Tech Stack
Go or Rust (ratatui/Bubble Tea) + Ollama API (local LLMs). Supports PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL.
